title: Where should the decision-creation script live? (issue #272)
context: Issue #272 explicitly defers whether the create/resolve script lands as a standalone scripts/ helper (parity with se-mark.ts) or a skill-bundled script under runtime/base/skills/. Surfaced to the user via AskUserQuestion.
rationale: User chose the skill-bundled route: ship create.mjs/resolve.mjs under runtime/base/skills/decision/ with a SKILL.md + references, logic in src/decisions/authoring.ts.
